name: Haven 3-Seater Sofa
description: A luxuriously comfortable 3-seater sofa with deep cushions, solid walnut legs and premium fabric upholstery. Perfect centerpiece for any modern living room.

name: Nordic L-Shape Sectional
description: Expansive L-shaped sectional with chaise lounge, solid pine frame and removable cushion covers. Ideal for large living rooms and open-plan spaces.

name: Elm Round Coffee Table
description: Handcrafted solid elm round coffee table with a natural live-edge finish and tapered oak legs. Adds warmth and character to any living space.

name: Aria Upholstered Bed
description: Elegant upholstered bed with tall tufted headboard, solid wood frame and luxurious velvet finish. A statement piece for any master bedroom.
